news_items.headline: Report: Astros to Call Up RP Miguel Ullola
news_items.summary: The Houston Astros are calling up pitching prospect Miguel Ullola, according to a report from Chandler Rome of The Athletic. Ullola, 24, is ranked as the Astros #11 prospect per MLB.com. Ullola was converted to a reliever this season in an effort to help him with his command issues and be someone the team could […]

news_items.headline: Interim GM John Mozeliak hoping to get Angels 'to a very successful place'
